description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a long, slender barrel and a solid, dark-colored fixed stock. The receiver and barrel are primarily black, with a section of the fore-end displaying a reddish-brown, likely wooden, texture. The trigger guard and trigger are visible beneath the receiver, and the rifle includes a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the barrel and receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The overall construction suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for both sporting and defensive use in urban environments.
description: A long, black rifle with a fixed stock and reddish-brown fore-end, featuring iron sights and a tubular magazine beneath the barrel.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow muzzle and a slight glimpse of the iron sight.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, reddish-brown fore-end, and tubular magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the full profile of the rifle, including the stock, fore-end, and barrel.
